headline: 3 Concrete & Aggregates Stocks to Watch Despite Industry Weakness
summary: Federal infrastructure spending should help the Zacks Building Products - Concrete & Aggregates industry players like VMC, MLM and RMIX. Yet, high rates and expenses are risks.

headline: Martin Marietta Appoints Christopher W. Samborski Chief Operating Officer
summary: RALEIGH, N.C., April 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (Martin Marietta or the Company) a leading national supplier of aggregates and other building materials, today announced the appointment of Chris Samborski as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective May 1, 2026. Mr. Samborski has extensive experience leading operating and finance teams. He most recently served as President of Martin Marietta’s West and Specialties Divisions, wher

headline: Stock Outperformance Isn't About Value, Growth, Biz Model, Or Execution
summary: Stock outperformance requires disciplined price entry and using volatility as an ally by buying on pullbacks. Learn why selective adds to IBM and NOW improve returns.
